title: Teerapong Tovirat
text: Home * People * Teerapong Tovirat Teerapong Tovirat , a Thai FIDE chess arbiter [1] , chess- and Thai chess player [2] , treasurer of the Thailand Chess Association [3] , and as checkers and chess programmer, author of the Thai Checkers [4] program Turtle and the Thai Chess [5] program Jumbo [6] .
